name: Vessel Vista Edge
summary: Vessel Vista Edge — a 510 cartridge battery for patients using 510 cartridges.
description: Its streamlined form factor and protective viewing collar deliver both durability and visibility, making it a standout option for premium cartridge-compatible devices. The Vista Edge uses a secure drop-in cartridge system paired with a sweeping, semi-open collar. This design shields the cartridge while still allowing users to monitor oil levels easily — a functional and stylish upgrade for any product lineup. Fully charge the Vista Edge using the included magnetic USB cable. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
